services.name: lidar-ingestion-service
services.project: LiDAR Object Detection System for Autonomous Vehicles
services.description: Receives raw point clouds from roof LiDAR and publishes normalized packets to ROS2 topics.

apis.name: POST /v1/frames/import
apis.purpose: Inject recorded point cloud frames for replay.

apis.name: ROS2 /lidar/points_raw
apis.purpose: Primary point cloud topic consumed by inference.

apis.name: GET /healthz
apis.purpose: Container health and backlog stats.

services.name: object-detection-service
services.project: LiDAR Object Detection System for Autonomous Vehicles
services.description: Handles PointPillars preprocessing, postprocessing, and box decoding around the TensorRT engine.

apis.name: POST /v1/detections/run
apis.purpose: Replay a frame through preprocessing and decode pipeline.

apis.name: ROS2 /lidar/detections
apis.purpose: Publishes decoded 3D detections.

apis.name: GET /metrics
apis.purpose: Exports latency and decode counters.

services.name: tracking-service
services.project: LiDAR Object Detection System for Autonomous Vehicles
services.description: Associates detections into short horizon object tracks and forwards tracked objects to planning mocks.

apis.name: ROS2 /lidar/tracks
apis.purpose: Publishes tracked objects for visualization.

apis.name: POST /v1/tracks/reset
apis.purpose: Reset tracker state between replay runs.

apis.name: GET /healthz
apis.purpose: Reports queue depth and stale track count.

services.name: edge-inference-service
services.project: LiDAR Object Detection System for Autonomous Vehicles
services.description: Owns TensorRT engine lifecycle, CUDA stream orchestration, quantized engine loading, and Jetson specific profiling hooks.

apis.name: POST /v1/engine/reload
apis.purpose: Reload TensorRT engine after calibration artifact update.

apis.name: POST /v1/infer
apis.purpose: Low latency inference endpoint used by detection pipeline.

apis.name: GET /v1/profile/memory
apis.purpose: Expose GPU allocator and buffer pool counters.

services.name: telemetry-service
services.project: LiDAR Object Detection System for Autonomous Vehicles
services.description: Collects runtime counters, rollout metadata, and replay experiment metrics from LiDAR services.

apis.name: POST /v1/events
apis.purpose: Ingest structured runtime events from edge services.

apis.name: GET /v1/deployments/{service}
apis.purpose: Query the last rollout summary for a service.

apis.name: GET /metrics
apis.purpose: Prometheus style telemetry scrape.

services.name: camera-ingestion-service
services.project: Lane Keeping Assist System using 2D Camera in ADAS ECU
services.description: Captures frames from front camera, timestamps them, and publishes synchronized frame packets to the lane stack.

apis.name: POST /v1/replay/frame
apis.purpose: Replay a recorded camera frame into the ECU rig.

apis.name: IPC /camera/front_center
apis.purpose: Primary image stream for lane detection.

apis.name: GET /v1/timing
apis.purpose: Returns last sensor timestamp and jitter stats.

services.name: lane-detection-service
services.project: Lane Keeping Assist System using 2D Camera in ADAS ECU
services.description: Runs experimental lane extraction pipelines and emits lane models with confidence values.

apis.name: POST /v1/lane/infer
apis.purpose: Replay a single frame through the current lane model.

apis.name: IPC /lane/model
apis.purpose: Publishes lane geometry for the controller.

apis.name: GET /v1/experiments
apis.purpose: Lists active algorithm toggles.

services.name: steering-control-service
services.project: Lane Keeping Assist System using 2D Camera in ADAS ECU
services.description: Transforms lane model output into steering corrections and CAN bus commands for the rig controller.

apis.name: POST /v1/controller/reset
apis.purpose: Reset controller integral state during testing.

apis.name: CAN steer.command.v2
apis.purpose: Publishes steering torque setpoints.

apis.name: GET /v1/controller/state
apis.purpose: Returns current gain profile and jitter counters.

services.name: calibration-service
services.project: Lane Keeping Assist System using 2D Camera in ADAS ECU
services.description: Stores camera intrinsic and extrinsic calibration bundles and exposes the active profile to perception services.

apis.name: POST /v1/calibration/upload
apis.purpose: Upload a new camera calibration bundle.

apis.name: GET /v1/calibration/active
apis.purpose: Returns the active calibration profile and checksum.

apis.name: POST /v1/calibration/cache/flush
apis.purpose: Clears cached profile state after a rig restart.

services.name: diagnostics-service
services.project: Lane Keeping Assist System using 2D Camera in ADAS ECU
services.description: Aggregates prototype rig diagnostics, controller anomalies, and calibration warnings for engineering runs.

apis.name: POST /v1/diag/events
apis.purpose: Store diagnostic events during road replay tests.

apis.name: GET /v1/diag/session/{session_id}
apis.purpose: Fetch a compact run summary.

apis.name: GET /metrics
apis.purpose: Expose controller oscillation counters and frame gaps.
